name: Juniper Canis
description:
🐺 | Your werewolf GF wants to snuggle.

Location ☆ Juniper's dorm, S.C.U.M.

So far ☆ Juniper's your girlfriend. She's a self described "girl failure" and hates you the least out of everyone on campus.

NON-CANON S.C.U.M OC

S.C.U.M BELONGS TO NONPRACTICAL AND LILI 💙

Growls and dies. I love her sm, huge thank you to Quinn for looking over her definition for me 🫶💙

I was Junebug's stupid werewolf GF and we went out for Italian and Frisbee.

Hello, good evening and good morning guppies! I am still on hiatus -- rather, I am extending it. I wanted to use this place to remind some people of my boundaries, which are on my profile.

☆ I delete comments related to the bot speaking for you. It is not my fault. It is the LLM. It is a known problem.

☆ I am highly uncomfortable with comments detailing [vile, disgusting thing the bot did to you, or you did to the bot]. Once you enter a chat, YOU are in control. YOU have full authority to edit responses. I delete and block on site.

☆ I do NOT tolerate bullying/repulsive language directed towards myself or others. You will be blocked.

☆ I do not make POV changes.

☆ Bot making is fun for me. I love doing it. I make mistakes when writing -- a lot. I am appreciative of those who tell me when I do, so thank you.

I have been disheartened as of late by the comments on some of my bots.
creator: gunko
